2605.22581.title: SceneAligner: 3D-Grounded Floorplan Localization in the Wild
2605.22581.paper_summary: Many public buildings provide floorplans with a "you are here" indicator to help visitors orient themselves. Floorplan localization seeks to computationally replicate this capability by determining where visual observations were captured within a floorplan. However, existing methods typically assume controlled small-scale environments and precise vectorized floorplans, limiting their ability to operate in large-scale buildings and rasterized floorplans. In this work, we present an approach for performing floorplan localization in the wild by grounding the task in a reconstructed 3D representation of the scene. Given an unconstrained image collection, our method reconstructs a gravity-aligned 3D scene and projects it into a 2D density map that serves as a floorplan proxy. Floorplan localization is then formulated as aligning this proxy with the input floorplan via a 2D similarity transform. To bridge the appearance gap between density maps and architectural floorplans, we adapt a 2D foundation model to learn cross-modal correspondences, introducing a fine-tuning scheme that encourages semantically aligned matches while preserving structural consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate substantial improvements over prior methods, including in extremely sparse settings with as little as a single input image. Our code and data will be publicly available.
2605.22581.paper_summary_zh: 許多公共建築提供帶有「您在這裡」指示的平面圖，以幫助訪客定位。平面圖定位旨在通過確定視覺觀察在平面圖中的捕獲位置來計算複製這一能力。然而，現有方法通常假設受控的小型環境和精確的向量化平面圖，限制了它們在大型建築和光柵化平面圖中的操作能力。在這項工作中，我們提出了一種在野外執行平面圖定位的方法，通過將任務基於重建的三維場景表示來實現。給定一組不受限制的圖像集合，我們的方法重建一個與重力對齊的三維場景，並將其投影到一個作為平面圖代理的二維密度圖中。然後，平面圖定位被公式化為通過二維相似變換將這個代理與輸入平面圖對齊。為了縮小密度圖和建築平面圖之間的外觀差距，我們調整了一個二維基礎模型來學習跨模態對應，並引入了一個微調方案，以鼓勵語義上對齊的匹配，同時保持結構一致性。大量實驗顯示出相較於先前方法的顯著改進，包括在極度稀疏的環境中僅使用一張輸入圖像。我們的代碼和數據將公開提供。
2605.22581.author: Junhyeong Cho et.al.
2605.22581.authors: Junhyeong Cho, Ruojin Cai, Hadar Averbuch-Elor
